title: xanthophyllum lateriflorum
intro: Xanthophyllum lateriflorum is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the xanthophyllum or later flowering xanthophyllum, which is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum lateriflorum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Xanthophyllum lateriflorum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
